svg.title: Skinfluence Shopify architecture diagram
svg.desc: A structural diagram showing how all tools in the Skinfluence tech stack connect, organized in five layers: patient touchpoints, storefront, clinical platform, data and lifecycle, and fulfillment.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should the Skinfluence Shopify homepage hero section be structured?')
sendPrompt('How should the Skinfluence skin assessment quiz be structured?')

sendPrompt('How should Skinfluence use Reddit and community building?')

g.text: Shopify storefront — single source of truth
